context: Reaching out to a referral about job opportunities
incoming_subject: Reference from Mr. Subba Gonella - Opportunities at PwC
reply:
Dear Nathan Sir,

I hope you are doing well.

My name is Pavan Sai Pillalamarri. I was referred to you by my uncle, Mr. Subba Gonella, and wanted to check if there might be any suitable opportunities at PwC.

I hold an MS in Information Technology (Data Science) from IIIT Hyderabad and have experience working as a Data Analyst / SDE with skills in Python, SQL, Excel and Power BI. I am currently exploring new opportunities and would be grateful if you could kindly review my profile.

Please find my resume attached.

Warm regards,
Pavan Sai Pillalamarri
+91 6309650821
pavanpillalamarri222@gmail.com

context: Replying to HR regarding final salary and pending bonus processing
incoming_subject: Confirmation Required for Final Salary Processing
reply:
Dear Divya,

Thank you for the update.
I confirm the final salary calculation for 30 days as detailed above. Please proceed with the immediate processing of the final salary.
I would also like to request the immediate processing of the pending bonus for the last four months.

Thanks & Regards,
Pavan Sai P

context: Requesting a refund for a double challan payment
reply:
Hi Helpdesk,

I am writing regarding a recent challan payment.

I paid a challan on the e-challan website of my bike, but the first attempt did not reflect as successful, leading me to make a second payment. As a result, I have paid the challan twice.

I would like to request a refund for the duplicate payment. I have attached the receipts for both payments for your reference.

Please let me know the process for initiating the refund.

Thank you for your time and assistance.

Sincerely,
Pavan Sai P
